description: The AvatarPoseRotationConstraint component is used to either restrict the rotation direction of the user's arm when using a tooltip, or to restrict the rotation of a particular BodyNode.

fields.MaxTwist: the max twist in degrees allowed for the object being filtered.
fields.MaxSwing: the max swing in degrees allowed for the object being filtered.
fields.Axis: swing axis direction for the object being filtered.
fields.TwistReferenceAxis: The twist axis direction for the object being filtered.

usage: Used in avatar anchors and in tooltip contraints.
